def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # 7-day rolling mean of close: sum(close, 7) / 7
    mean_7 = rolling_sum(pl.col('close'), window=7) / 7
    
    # (sum(close,7)/7) - close
    diff = mean_7 - pl.col('close')
    
    # scale(((sum(close,7)/7) - close))  -- cross-section
    scaled_diff = scale(diff).over('date')
    
    # delay(close, 5)
    delay_close_5 = delay(pl.col('close'), periods=5)
    
    # correlation(vwap, delay(close, 5), 230)
    corr_230 = rolling_corr(pl.col('vwap'), delay_close_5, window=230)
    
    # scale(correlation)  -- cross-section
    scaled_corr = scale(corr_230).over('date')
    
    # Final factor: scale(...) + 20 * scale(...)
    factor = scaled_diff + 20 * scaled_corr
    
    return df.select(factor).to_series()
